name: Kokonoi Hajime
description:
Expectations of a sweet treat and a cute pumpkin patch are quickly lost as its surprisingly hard to figure out the route out of a cornmaze

🍂🎃🌱🎃ྀིྀིྀིྀིྀི🍂🎃🌱

Bot Info:

Part of my halloween/fall based series

This was a request, i rlly didn’t follow it properly (IM SORRY) because i rlly wanted to do more seasonally themed bots, so i swear i’ll make another one that follows the request closer !

airhead user x strict moneymaking genius kokonoi (who hates to admit he actually cares for user)

Mild Akane angst, mentions of her and its coded into his character

Bonten timeline, limited ? since its just set for them as friends and that seems to work better for longterm plot. User’s history with koko is left open, add stuff to the chat memory to tweak to your liking !

User drags Kokonoi to a pumpkin patch, expecting a quick trip, a good PSL and maybe a pumpkin or two for the office. Instead, he and user’s terrible sense of direction gets them deeply lost inside a cornmaze

not fully tested

🍂🎃🌱🎃ྀིྀིྀིྀིྀི🍂🎃🌱

Yapping:

ive gotten so scared in corn mazes before i cried, i love spooky corn mazes sm

couldn’t decide if it should be a ‘haunted’ corn maze or not, this idea was actually adapted from a ‘*gang* goes to a corn maze’, i just couldn’t decide which gang
